Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:

Modified: head/databases/p5-ORLite-Migrate/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/p5-ORLite-Migrate/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:18 2014	(r355387)
+++ head/databases/p5-ORLite-Migrate/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:23 2014	(r355388)
@@ -9,9 +9,12 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:ADAMK
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Light weight SQLite-specific schema migration
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-File-pushd>=1.00:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-pushd \
 		p5-IPC-Run3>=0.042:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IPC-Run3 \
 		p5-ORLite>=1.28:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-ORLite \
